display_name: Enabled by Cerebras’s custom high-performance chips, GPT 5.3 Codex Spark is OpenAI's lightweight coding model optimized for fast code generation (~1000 tokens / second). Supports a 128k context window
description:
Enabled by Cerebras’s custom high-performance chips, GPT 5.3 Codex Spark is OpenAI's lightweight coding model optimized for fast code generation (~1000 tokens / second). Supports a 128k context window. Poe users get early research preview access to GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark at near-zero cost.

This bot supports optional parameters for additional customization.
